risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to lack of alignment keys.
risk.mit: Add alignment keys to all critical interfaces.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal stress due to uneven heat distribution.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management design to ensure even heat distribution.

risk.desc: Potential for structural failure under handling loads.
risk.mit: Conduct static and handling load tests to verify structural integrity.

risk.desc: Risk of incorrect mating due to unlabeled connectors.
risk.mit: Label all connectors and ensure clear keying or labeling.

risk.desc: Potential for strain relief issues due to unsupported cable exits.
risk.mit: Ensure all cable exits have strain relief geometry.
